allow: PowerShell(Stop-Job -Name "helpdeskapi" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Job -Name "helpdeskapi" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost:7247/swagger/v1/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode, @{n='Length';e={$_.Content.Length}} } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
